comment: "I enjoyed the focus on surgical safety, especially the implementation of checklists, teamwork, and communication in preventing errors, is crucial for improving patient outcomes. Additionally, the detailed discussions on microvascular reconstructive surgery, flap perfusion, and post-operative care are particularly fascinating because they delve into the complexities of managing delicate surgical procedures and optimizing healing."
"This is a great topic especially for me as a plastic surgery resident."
"I enjoyed learning about the skin graft techniques."
"I found the management of the circulatory goals to be paticularly interesting."
